lines.speaker: Lord Piquan Crwys
lines.text: Hello there young one. Interested in getting your hands dirty?

lines.speaker: Lord Piquan Crwys
lines.text: Ah don't worry, it's nothing sinister. We leave that kind of thing to clan Iorwerth. I speak in a more literal sense, of the ground beneath us and the trees over us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see. So it's your clan that looks after the plants of the city?

lines.speaker: Lord Piquan Crwys
lines.text: Indeed. We maintain the farms and manage the trees. The produce we grow goes to the Meilyr clan to feed the city and the wood we provide is used by the Ithell clan in construction.

lines.speaker: Lord Piquan Crwys
lines.text: Feel free to join us. Our farming patches are open to you, as is our sawmill.
